feed.title: SAP Community - SAP BTP, ABAP environment
feed.subtitle: SAP BTP, ABAP environment Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: ISSUE : BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE adding new item
entry.content:
I trying to add new batch split using BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE ( T-code VL02N)
Its urgent . Please help me on this 

Getting this error : Essential transfer parameters are missing in record: 000001 .


Here is my code :



Regards ,
Vasanth

entry.title: QR Code issue if Invoice has multiple Pages
entry.content:
Hi Folks,

I have Created a QR Code and attached in SAP Script. Now it is working properly when the invoice has one page. But if invoice line items flows two second page the Qr Code is not Getting Printed in SAP SAcript.

 

If anybody faced this issue can suggest me a solution

 

Regards,

Mantri Shekar.

entry.title: How to call a web service with user credentials dynamically in BTP
entry.content:
Hello Friends,

I have a requirement to call a Webservice in BTP Process Automation.   It works good through the "Call Webservice with Destination".  Whereas I would like to pass the Credentials at dynamically.

[Note: The reason behind this is, whenever there is a change in the SAP Login Password, we need to change the password in the respective Destinations also in the BTP Cockpit, every time.  Maintaining the password in every destination is little difficult as lots of destinations are there.  We cant even ask the user to do this exercise. ]

Please help me.

entry.title: Multiple Select Window on Click of Custom Button in Object Page
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to select multiple user names and need to create all selected user names in object Page.

It should be same like "Maintain Business Roles" App.

Please help how can i achieve the same .

Thanks,

Nitin

entry.title: Issue on Transportation of roles
entry.content:
In ECC system While transferring roles from Development to Quality and Quality to production system, some roles are missing in production system how to retrieve the roles to production system.

Thanks in advance for your  Answer.

Regards,

Abhiram

entry.title: sap abap email functionality using classes issue with html table
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

 I have to send email via program . When I created the body of the email without containing any variable but only text, there is no issue in it. But when I wants to get variable values inside table it is not taking the values.

it_email_body[] = VALUE #( ( line = '<html><body>' )
                           ( line = 'Date:'  )   "how to use sy-datum here.
                            ( line = '<br>')
                            ( line = 'Subject: Revalidate request' ) ( line = '<br>')
  ( line = 'QA/ QC Team.' ) ( line = '<br>')
  ( line = 'Refer to below details of material expiring/ expired. You are requested to kindly review and re-validate the same.' )

   ( line = '<br>')
   ( line = '<table style="font-family:calibri;font-size:15;MARGIN:10px;"' )
   ( line = 'cellspacing="0" cellpadding="1" width="75%" ')
   ( line =  'border="1"><tbody><tr>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Sr. No.</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Material Description</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Material code</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Expired / Expiring on</th>' )
   ( line = '<th bgcolor="#C0C0C0">Batch No.</th>' )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-matnr '</td>' )  "facing issue at this line for creating second  row for values to  the table from the worarea WA-matnr wa-batch .
( line = '<tr><td>' wa-  '</td></tr>' )
   ( line =   )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-charg 
*   ( line =  '</td>' )
*   ( line = '<tr><td>' wa-vfdat 
*   ( line = '</td>' )

  ( line = '</html></body>' )

 ( line = 'Post validation, kindly share the re-validated/ validity extension certificate for updates and records.' )

This is not working.

it_email_body TYPE bcsy_text,  as per the c ode

note : My aim here is to get html table to be added to program with  email functionality.
 ( line = 'Regards' )
 ( line = 'Stores Team.' ) ).

entry.title: Update multiple records in one infotype
entry.content: How can I update all records for a given PERNR in a specific infotype?  I am trying to use FM HR_MAINTAIN_MASTERDATA, but it seems that the PAKEY must be specified for each call to the FM.  Basically, what I am trying to do is set the TELNR (among other fields) for all records for a given PERNR in PA0006 to the same random value.

entry.title: UUIDs and Unique Semantic Primary Keys
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm working with RAP in BTP and have a question regarding UUIDs and semantic primary keys.

What is the best and recommended way to guarantee the uniqueness of a semantic primary key?

In RAP and OData V4, UUIDs provide us with the ability to create entities in draft mode without needing to validate the keys in the creation popup, which has limitations for more complex checking and responding with messages. Often, these validations result in the popup closing, causing the user to lose the data they have entered and forcing them to re-enter it.

I believe using automatically generated UUIDs allows us to move directly to the edit screen, where we have more control for validations and displaying messages without losing the input data.

I have two options already envisioned for helping me with this issue:

  • Using a validation for create and updating the BO (select in the table and check for uniqueness). Which I'm already using but I think there might be a better way for it
  • Using an unique index in the table and handling the errors. I've not implemented this solution but I imagine would be less cumbersome to implement.

I'm looking forward to hear the input from the colleagues,

Jayme

entry.title: BADI For Dunning notice - SAP PUBLIC CLOUD
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

  We are trying to add custom fields logic for a dunning notice form but we could not able to get BADI name on public cloud, can you please suggest.

Form name :  FIN_FO_DUNN_NOTE

 

Regards,

Kathiravan S

SAP Forms service by Adobe SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: Interface technologies supported by SAP BTP, ABAP environment
entry.content:
Dear all,

SAP BTP, ABAP is supposed to be used with the RAP Model and thus OData and REST as the technlogical base. However, of course there are other technologies like SOAP with WSDL, SAP RFC system calls, CSV files... I am wondering whether there is an overview showing which interfaces are supported when using BTP ABAP for both incoming and outgoing data. Does this exist somewhere?

Thanks for your assistance

Felix

entry.title: ABAP
entry.content:
Hello, I need help with the following question:

Which of the following actions cause an indirect change to a database table requiring a table conversion?
Note: There are 2 correct answers to this question.

a. Changing the field labels of a data element that is used in the table definition.

b. Shortening the length of a domain used in a data element that is used in the table definition.

c. Renaming a field in a structure that is included in the table definition

d. Deleting a field from a structure that is included in the table definition.

entry.title: BTP, ABAP Edition and use of flat files
entry.content:
Dear community,

Is the usage of flat files/CSV files still supported with BTP, ABAP Edition?

E.g. is it still possible to upload files to a storage reachable by ABAP jobs running in the BTP, use the respective ABAP statements to read and process the files? (And also write to files and make them available to a location outside BTP)

Thank you for your help.

 

Felix

entry.title: Connecting to Cloud Foundry provided by BTP trial
entry.content:
Hello,

I am following a tutorial to deploy an Fiori application in an BTP trial environment. I am having trouble connecting the BAS to the Cloud Foundry environment as shown in Step 3. When doing as proposed in Number 7 of step three I receive the message "Authentication failed. Please try again" as the screenshot shows (ofc I changed the mail address before taking the screenshot).

I also tried to log into the cloud foundry environment using cf CLI with the same result.

Does anybody is facing a similar issue?

Thank you very much for your help

entry.title: How to send data's SAP Environment Management Module to DataSphere?
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

Greetings of the Day!

I want to know about the process of Sending data's from Environment management module to SAP Data sphere.

Also Could you please  guide me how the data's should flow from EM to Sustainable control Tower Module.

 

Thanks & Regards

Tam

entry.title: How to change storage bin and type in outbound delivery ?
entry.content:
Dear Friends ,

I'm using 
1 ) BAPI_OUTB_DELIVERY_CHANGE : for update quantity , For existing record .
2 ) L_TO_CREATE_DN  : for create TO for outbound delivery .
3 ) L_TO_CONFIRM  : for confirm TO generated by Bapi "L_TO_CREATE_DN" .
4 ) WS_DELIVERY_UPDATE : for creating PGI .

Is there any way  BAPI to change the Storage bin and type for batch item in outbound delivery .

Please help me on this .

Regards ,
Vasanth

entry.title: Is it possible to show/hide all the fields of a field group based on tab (field group) selection?
entry.content: We can toggle fields based on conditions on other fields or other logic in the features methods, instance or global. However, can we do the same based on the tab selection, so that only 1 field group is visible at a time?

entry.title: Additional Binding in Consumption.valueHelpDefinition annotation not working.
entry.content:
I want to filter the results of my Value Help coming from another CDS View based on certain values, for which I am using the following code:

@Consumption.valueHelpDefinition: [{ qualifier: '', entity: { name: 'Z_ELEMENTS', element: 'ElementUuid' }, 
        distinctValues: true, enabled: '', 
        additionalBinding: [{localParameter: '', localElement: 'Board', localConstant: '', parameter: '', element: 'MetaBoard', 
        usage: #FILTER_AND_RESULT }], label: '', presentationVariantQualifier: '' }]

 

when I filter in the SQL console using the values and the join condition, it works fine, however, here the additional binding to filter does not work and gives me the whole unfiltered list, except in the case of using #FILTER, wherein in I get usually an empty result when used in Info View, and still the whole list when used in Projection Views.

 

I also do not under the role of 'enabled' property, because n selecting anything, the application stops working.

 

Thank You

entry.title: Read substring
entry.content:
Hi All,

I would like to read the value XXXXX in the below string

<String1><DbtrAcct><Id><Other><Id>XXXXX</Id><String2>

Is there any string function that i can use to read. BTW, this will be multiple times.

Regards,

Salil

entry.title: SAP BTP - Cloud vs ON premise
entry.content: Does SAP BTP exclusively integrate with cloud-based solutions or does it also support on-premise solutions?

entry.title: SAP TCODES USAGE BY USERS
entry.content: Are there any efficient ways to find all users who just use just one tcode or few tcodes in SAP ABAP
